completed_tasks.name: Decision Coverage Gate: fixed via light citation pass (added D-NN refs to must_haves.truths in 01-01 and 01-02), re-ran -> 15/15 PASSED

remaining_tasks.name: Wave 1: Walking Skeleton (scaffold, config, WAL SQLite DB, models, Alembic, admin seed, login/logout cookie auth, dark-theme login page, pytest infra) - 3 tasks incl. Task 0 blocking checkpoint
Wave 2: Talent catalog vertical slice (protected CRUD + product-mapping endpoints, idempotent 21-talent seed) - 2 tasks
Wave 3: Public /health, change-password + create-user endpoints, frontend 401->login redirect - 2 tasks

human_actions_pending.action: Approve dependency/package install plan at Plan 01-01 Task 0 blocking checkpoint
human_actions_pending.context: Task 0 is a non-autonomous checkpoint that validates the dependency set (FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PyJWT, pwdlib[argon2], Alembic, etc.) and Python 3.12 compatibility before any code is written. The planner marked the package set as [ASSUMED] (slopcheck unavailable during planning).

human_actions_pending.action: Populate .env with SECRET_KEY, ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD, COOKIE_SECURE before Plan 01-01 finishes
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 01-01 frontmatter user_setup block requires these env vars for the admin seed script and login flow. SECRET_KEY via `openssl rand -hex 32`; COOKIE_SECURE=False for local http dev (Pitfall 4), True in prod.

decisions.decision: Used existing 01-RESEARCH.md and 01-VALIDATION.md from prior session rather than re-researching
decisions.rationale: Both already complete and committed from the previous session (per STATE.md Session Continuity note)

decisions.decision: Treated plan-checker's 'ISSUES FOUND' (0 blockers, 4 warnings, prose format with no YAML issues block) as issue_count=0 and skipped the revision loop
decisions.rationale: plan-phase.md step 12 explicitly says: if checker return contains no YAML issues block, treat issue_count as 0 and proceed to step 13. Checker's own recommendation was 'no blockers, proceed to /gsd-execute-phase'.

decisions.decision: Resolved Decision Coverage Gate failure (3/15 D-IDs covered) via a 'light citation pass' instead of full re-plan
decisions.rationale: User chose this option given context budget (66% used at the time). Edited must_haves.truths in 01-01-PLAN.md and 01-02-PLAN.md to add (D-NN) citations for D-01,02,04-10,13-15, matching the existing (D-03)/(D-11)/(D-12) citation style already present in 01-03-PLAN.md. Re-ran gate -> 15/15 covered.

decisions.decision: Did NOT auto-advance to /gsd-execute-phase despite workflow.auto_advance=true
decisions.rationale: Context usage reached 79% (critical) by the time planning gates passed. Auto-advancing into a full execute-phase agent chain at that context level risks running out mid-execution. Recommended /clear then /gsd-execute-phase 1 instead.

next_action: /clear then /gsd-execute-phase 1 -- executes the 3 committed plans (01-01, 01-02, 01-03) in order. Plan 01-01 Task 0 will pause for a blocking human checkpoint to approve dependency installs.
context_notes: Planning for Phase 1 is fully complete and gate-passed (15/15 decisions, 5/5 requirements). The 4 plan-checker warnings are non-blocking and can be fixed during/after execution: (1) 01-VALIDATION.md Per-Task Verification Map still has TBD placeholders, (2) app/services/__init__.py placeholder missing from Plan 01's files_modified (CLAUDE.md mandates app/services/ folder), (3) 01-RESEARCH.md Open Questions section not marked (RESOLVED), (4) Plan 01-01 has 31 files_modified / Task 2 alone touches ~13 files -- watch for context-budget strain during execution of Task 2; if it shows signs of running short, consider splitting into 'backend auth wiring' + 'frontend login UI + alembic' in a follow-up revision.
